git_commit_info.message:
env log repo filter (#653)

* Add repo flag to log env command

* Add repo flag to log environment command

* Update cmd/kosli/logEnvironment.go

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add note that repoNameFlag is optional

* Update how url is built

* Refactor url building to use JoinPath instead of string formatting

* Fix integration test to create repo for second artifact

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
